name: brainjar agent skills
description: Server-shipped skills for brainjar. Install all with: npx skills add brainjar-sh/skills -g --all -y

skills.name: brainjar-authoring
skills.title: Brainjar authoring
skills.description: Create or update brainjar content: souls, personas, rules, procedures, skills, brains.

skills.name: brainjar-orchestration
skills.title: Brainjar orchestration
skills.description: Dispatch a brainjar-composed subagent over MCP. Open a fresh context window for a focused task.

skills.name: brainjar-write-soul
skills.title: Write a brainjar soul
skills.description: Author a soul: the agent's voice, character, values, and standards.

skills.name: brainjar-write-persona
skills.title: Write a brainjar persona
skills.description: Author a persona: the role the agent plays (architect, reviewer, CTO, infra engineer).

skills.name: brainjar-write-rule
skills.title: Write a brainjar rule
skills.description: Author a rule: a constraint or convention (security, git-discipline, testing).

skills.name: brainjar-write-procedure
skills.title: Write a brainjar procedure
skills.description: Author a procedure: a step-by-step playbook the agent runs (incident response, code review, oncall handoff).

skills.name: brainjar-write-skill
skills.title: Write a brainjar skill
skills.description: Author a skill: an on-demand capability the agent loads when triggers match. Carries the canonical body templates and scope guidance.
